calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff, Alma C. Cerrato Velasquez, And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,160.00; Declaration Of Thomas M. Murphy
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A., INC.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff, Alma C. Cerrato Velasquez, And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,160.00;

Defendant Toyota Motor Sales USA, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff, Alma C. Cerrato Velasquez, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR.

On 5/5/2026, Defendant filed a notice of taking this motion off calendar. The motion is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
